title: Get a GST/HST number and manage your account - Canada.ca
content:
## Get a GST/HST number and manage your account
Find out how to register for a GST/HST account and make changes to your account. Know your responsibilities, including when to update or close your account with the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA).
- Authorize a representative
- Update your business information

## Services and information

### Register for a GST/HST account
How to open a GST/HST account, information you need to register

### Make changes to your GST/HST account
Types of changes you can make, keep account information up to date

### Close your GST/HST account
How and why you may need to close an account
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
